BackstoryDef.title: progena
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: After being orphaned, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the Schola Progenium and went through strict indoctrination, education, and training according to Imperial edict.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum brat
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised among the camp followers of a Militarum regiment. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood running errands for soldiers and support troops, while trying to grab some normality with other children in the same situation.

BackstoryDef.title: Cadian Whiteshield
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was made a Whiteshield, a cadet soldier in a Cadian regiment, at a young age, training with live rounds and doing intense drill in addition to regular labour or education.

BackstoryDef.title: voidborn child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised on an asteroid processing void station, living off nutrient paste and breathing stale air.

BackstoryDef.title: noble child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in unimaginable privilege as the child of a noble family in an Imperial hive city. [PAWN_pronoun] had everything [PAWN_pronoun] could ever ask for, and a lot more besides, but was unused to menial tasks.

BackstoryDef.title: bonded scribe
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was promised to an Administratum scribe-clan at an early age. Separated from [PAWN_possessive] family, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read and write and was put to work copying missives and memoranda as they passed through the scribe-clan's assigned bureaucratic level. Constant scribework has left [PAWN_objective] more frail than most.

BackstoryDef.title: cultist child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised among a cult worshipping the Ruinous Powers. The cultists were wiped out in an Ordo Hereticus raid, but an uncharacteristically merciful interrogator deemed [PAWN_nameDef] to be free from corruption, and [PAWN_pronoun] escaped execution or servitorisation.

BackstoryDef.title: deathworlder
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the unforgiving hell of a death world where the very flora and fauna is inimical to human survival. Only the toughest survive such a childhood.

BackstoryDef.title: agriworld child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on an agriworld, a planet-wide food production operation. [PAWN_pronoun] has been familiar with machines, livestock and harvesting from a young age.

BackstoryDef.title: voidship child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a child of a voidship clan tasked with menial maintenance of a machine none of them understood but regarded almost as divine. [PAWN_pronoun] is unused to open skies but good with [PAWN_possessive] hands.

BackstoryDef.title: Ministorum foundling
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was orphaned at a young age and given to the Adeptus Ministorum for training and education. Although [PAWN_pronoun] spent much of his childhood confined to a bare cell in prayer, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read and write and still knows numerous hymns and catechisms of the God Emperor by heart.

BackstoryDef.title: xenos raid survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: When still a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was one of the only survivors of a deadly xenos raid which killed most of [PAWN_possessive] community. Although it spurred a fierce interest in the wider galaxy, [PAWN_possessive] struggles with the trauma of the massacre to this day.

BackstoryDef.title: peasant child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a peasant family on a feudal world with a largely medieval level of technology. [PAWN_pronoun] had few prospects for life beyond subsistence farming or service in the levy.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum trooper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was conscripted into the Astra Militarum and trained in the use of a lasgun and bayonet. [PAWN_pronoun] has seen combat in several large-scale battles and is somehow miraculously still alive.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum deserter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was conscripted into the Astra Militarum and trained in the use of a lasgun and bayonet. [PAWN_pronoun] deserted and somehow evaded the commissars, but is often worried that [PAWN_possessive] actions will catch up with [PAWN_pronoun].

BackstoryDef.title: penal legionary
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was convicted of a capital crime on an Imperial world and pressed into a Penal Legion. [PAWN_pronoun] was sent into battle as las fodder but managed to run away and somehow remove the bomb collar around [PAWN_possessive] neck. So far [PAWN_pronoun] has avoided death or capture.

BackstoryDef.title: redeemed penal legionary
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was convicted of a capital crime on an Imperial world and pressed into a Penal Legion as las fodder. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to survive, however, and on [PAWN_possessive] sixth deployment [PAWN_pronoun] saved the life of a Militarum staff officer in the face of overwhelming heretical numbers. As a reward for this act of exceptional valour, [PAWN_nameDef] was granted the Emperor's forgiveness and the high honour of joining a regiment as a regular Guardsman.

BackstoryDef.title: PDF trooper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of [PAWN_possessive] homeworld's Planetary Defence Forces and trained in the basic use of a lasgun and bayonet. Although [PAWN_pronoun] did not see combat, this familiarity is still useful.

BackstoryDef.title: PDF veteran
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of [PAWN_possessive] homeworld's Planetary Defence Forces and trained in the basic use of a lasgun and bayonet. [PAWN_pronoun] participated in a bloody defence of [PAWN_possessive] world and miraculously survived.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum medicae
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: After conscription into the Astra Militarum, [PAWN_nameDef] was trained as a platoon-level medicae. [PAWN_pronoun] is used to being around wounds and has an aptitude for blades.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum senior medicae
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: After conscription into the Astra Militarum, [PAWN_nameDef] was trained as a regimental medicae. [PAWN_pronoun] is a skilled surgeon with an aptitude for blades.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum flamer trooper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: After conscription into the Astra Militarum, [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to use a flamer in combat. [PAWN_pronoun] has grown to love the smell of promethium jelly and the way the fire dances; coincidentally, [PAWN_pronoun] has also learned how to treat burns.

BackstoryDef.title: Valkyrie pilot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of the Imperial Navy and trained to fly Valkyrie dropships in support of Militarum operations. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the basics of aircraft maintenance and is a proficient navigator and pilot.

BackstoryDef.title: lighter pilot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Part of a voidship crew, [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to fly lighters - small shuttles intended for cargo and personnel transfer to other ships, stations, or planetary surfaces. [PAWN_pronoun] is a reasonably skilled pilot and is well-used to helping haul cargo on and off [PAWN_possessive] craft.

BackstoryDef.title: voidship chirurgeon
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a chirurgeon aboard a voidship, providing medical care for the crew when needed. [PAWN_pronoun] became proficient with suturing wounds, treating diseases, and affixing augmetic limbs to unlucky ratings who got their extremities caught in the machinery of the voidship's systems.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum officer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was commissioned as an officer in a regiment of the Astra Militarum. [PAWN_pronoun] has commanded troops in several campaigns and is miraculously still alive, having escaped enemy fire and that of [PAWN_possessive] own men.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum staff officer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was commissioned as an officer of the Astra Militarum, and was assigned to a position on the staff of a senior officer on the basis of meritorious service. [PAWN_pronoun] has some command experience and is used to smoothing the ruffled feathers of aggrieved commanders and generals, but has grown accustomed to some of the privileges of rank and the general's table.

BackstoryDef.title: Militarum staff officer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was commissioned as an officer of the Astra Militarum, and was quickly assigned to a position on the staff of a senior officer due to [PAWN_possessive] connections. In spite of being promoted above [PAWN_possessive] capabilities through nepotism, [PAWN_pronoun] has some experience managing aggrieved commanders and generals, though [PAWN_pronoun] is mostly fond of the privileges of rank afforded to [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: Munitorum adept
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to serve in the Departmento Munitorum, responsible for the logistics of the Astra Militarum. [PAWN_possessive] life was dominated by lists, numbers, and endless amounts of paper and cogitator read-outs, and [PAWN_pronoun] became used to running off very little sleep to catch up with the endless demands of the Imperium's war machine.

BackstoryDef.title: Munitorum menial
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a menial of the Departmento Munitorum, responsible for minor tasks in the logistics and support of the Astra Militarum. [PAWN_possessive] life was dominated by bulk cooking of Militarum rations, scrubbing floors, and running message slips back and forth between [PAWN_possessive] superiors. [PAWN_pronoun] became used to functioning with very little sleep and working as fast as [PAWN_pronoun] could to get through the day.

BackstoryDef.title: servant
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a domestic worker bound in service to an Imperial noble house, part of a vast staff responsible for upkeep of palatial mansion-blocks and estates. [PAWN_pronoun] became used to running off very little sleep and working as hard as [PAWN_pronoun] could to avoid censure or possible servitorisation as punishment for dereliction - habits that are very hard to break.

BackstoryDef.title: navigator servant
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a domestic worker bound in service to a house of the Navis Nobilite, the sanctioned mutant psykers on whom the Imperium's interstellar travel relies. In addition to being expected to work diligently for long hours, [PAWN_pronoun] and [PAWN_possessive] fellow servants were selected for being less susceptible to the eddies and flurries in the warp caused by the Navigators, so they would be better able to perform their duties without interruption or worse.

BackstoryDef.title: medicae
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] operated a medicae practice in an Imperial hive city. [PAWN_pronoun] had to contend with innumerable diseases and labouring accidents in his line of work, and is a skilled surgeon.

BackstoryDef.title: chartist officer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an officer on a chartist vessel - a voidship that plied the interstellar tradelanes of the Imperium, lacking a navigator and relying on short jumps through the warp to make its slow way from system to system, laden down with cargo and passengers. [PAWN_pronoun] is well-used to commanding underlings and to a life spent in the void.

BackstoryDef.title: voidship clan member
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a crew clan on the lower decks of an ancient Imperial voidship, tasked with operation of a machine none of them understood but which they regarded almost as divine.

BackstoryDef.title: voidsman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the middle-deck crew of an Imperial voidship, performing skilled tasks and being expected to stand in the ship's defence in case of boarding actions.

BackstoryDef.title: void pirate
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years on a voidship operated by pirates, preying on chartist traders and supply ships. Against the odds, [PAWN_pronoun] has somehow evaded the Emperor's justice until now.

BackstoryDef.title: agriworld labourer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a field labourer on an agriworld in a planet-wide food production operation. [PAWN_pronoun] spent 14-hour shifts tending to endless fields of crops, and had little time for anything else.

BackstoryDef.title: malcontent
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived and worked in a hive city but chafed against the strictures of Imperial society. [PAWN_pronoun] never went as far as insurrection or heresy, but could never accept [PAWN_possessive] place in the Imperium, and sought out subversive art and literature.

BackstoryDef.title: hiveskin herder
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a livestock herder in a hive city - a counterintuitive but surprisingly common occupation. [PAWN_pronoun] was charged with taking herds of grazing animals from in-hive pens to the mossy, grassy hiveskin area under giant transparent windows, tending to the animals until they were slaughtered for meat and hides.

BackstoryDef.title: lay Ministorum adept
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a lay cleric of the Adeptus Ministorum. [PAWN_pronoun] assisted with cathedrum services and breathed enough incense to last a lifetime, but is unused to manual labour.

BackstoryDef.title: historitor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a historitor of the Adeptus Administratum who had the privilege to work within the Imperial Palace on Holy Terra. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] days censoring and revising and reshaping historical accounts to fit Imperial dogma, and [PAWN_possessive] scholarship and powers of recall have been honed to a razor's edge by the work, although speed was never a quality demanded by the Officio Historica.

BackstoryDef.title: Inquisitorial acolyte
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an acolyte of an Inquisitorial warband. Working under an Inquisitor - or, more frequently, one of the Inquisitor's subordinates - [PAWN_pronoun] became somewhat inured to danger and hardship, providing muscle and an extra gun when called upon.

BackstoryDef.title: peasant
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a peasant on a feudal world with a largely medieval level of technology. [PAWN_pronoun] lived as a subsistence farmer and survived several plagues before he left his homeworld.

BackstoryDef.title: yeoman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a yeoman on a feudal world with a largely medieval level of technology, expected to fulfill [PAWN_possessive] duty in [PAWN_possessive] liege lord's levies in times of war.

BackstoryDef.title: feudal noble
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a vassal noble on a feudal world with a largely medieval level of technology, expected to fulfill [PAWN_possessive] duty to [PAWN_possessive] liege lord and living off the labour of serfs and tenants.

BackstoryDef.title: footman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on a Knight world, a planet organised along feudal aristocratic lines in service to maintaining and operating Knights, the ancient walking machines who can dominate most battlefields throughout the galaxy. [PAWN_pronoun] was a lower-class subject serving in the standing army of the Knight Houses - part soldier, part constable.

BackstoryDef.title: deathworlder
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on a deathworld - a planet where even the flora and fauna are totally inimcal to human life and existence is a struggle. [PAWN_pronoun] had to be extremely tough to survive to adulthood in such a place.

BackstoryDef.title: Administratum clerk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a clerk in the Adeptus Administratum. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] life among parchment, quills, and the odours of cogitators and servitors, destroying [PAWN_possessive] body in service to the demands of record-keeping and accounts.

BackstoryDef.title: hive ganger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of a gang in a hive city. Living outside of the Lex Imperialis, [PAWN_pronoun] had to survive on [PAWN_possessive] wits and cunning.

BackstoryDef.title: stim ganger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of a stim-dealing gang in a hive city. Living outside of the Lex Imperialis, [PAWN_pronoun] had to survive on [PAWN_possessive] wits and cunning - and a few hits of whatever [PAWN_pronoun] managed to skim off the stash.

BackstoryDef.title: underhive ganger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of a gang in the deep levels of a hive city. Living outside of the Lex Imperialis, [PAWN_pronoun] had to survive on [PAWN_possessive] wits and cunning.

BackstoryDef.title: Cold Trader
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of a illegitimate mercantile cartel focused on trading between xenos and humanity. Trade in xeno-artefacts is strictly forbidden by Imperial law and precepts, but people like [PAWN_nameDef] who engage in the 'Cold Trade' can find patronage and protection from official figures such as Rogue Traders or radically-inclined Inquisitors as long as they prove themselves useful.

BackstoryDef.title: smuggler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living smuggling illicit goods into an Imperial hive city. It was a profitable enterprise, although having to keep [PAWN_possessive] operation hidden from the enforcers made [PAWN_objective] paranoid.

BackstoryDef.title: data broker
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living as a data broker in a hive city, providing [PAWN_possessive] services both to legitimate mercantile conglomerates and to illegal cartels. [PAWN_pronoun] is most at home in noospheric data streams and has cultivated mnemonic techniques to mentally order the information [PAWN_possessive] living relies on.

BackstoryDef.title: enforcer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an enforcer in one of the Imperium's hive cities. Like the rest of those brutal police, [PAWN_pronoun] was used to breaking heads and rounding up habscum who broke the Lex.

BackstoryDef.title: sanctioner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a sanctioner in a hive city's enforcer corps. Sanctioners operate as kidnap teams and death squads, trained for assaults on Lex-breaking targets who need greater force brought to bear than patrolling enforcers can handle.

BackstoryDef.title: probator
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: As a probator in a hive city's enforcer corps, [PAWN_nameDef] was a detective, charged with investigation of Lex-breaking and apprehension of Lex-breakers.

BackstoryDef.title: enforcer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an enforcer on a void station, part of the brutal police enforcing the Imperium's laws and norms. [PAWN_pronoun] was used to breaking heads and rounding up scum who threatened the stability of the station.

BackstoryDef.title: recolliger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a recolliger clan on a derelict voidship. [PAWN_pronoun] was dropped off with the rest of the clan to salvage the ship, hoping to be picked up by another ship at some point in the future.

BackstoryDef.title: asteroid miner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an asteroid miner based on a void station. [PAWN_pronoun] endured the rough conditions and became familiar with ores, minerals, and mining machinery.

BackstoryDef.title: habspouse
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a habspouse, looking after domestic affairs for [PAWN_possessive] family. [PAWN_pronoun] can make a palatable meal out of unflavoured protein blocks and nutribars, a rare skill in itself.

BackstoryDef.title: stallholder
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] operated a vendor stall in a mid-hive mercatorium, preparing and serving hot food for the labourers who flooded the block every shift change. [PAWN_possessive] food was edible, but the real trick was standing out from the crowd and selling it.

BackstoryDef.title: flect dealer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a middleman in a hive city operation distributing flects, shards of warp-tainted glass that gave visions of other lives and otherworldly beings. [PAWN_pronoun] made a small fortune out of it, but the lure of staring into the flects [PAWN_pronoun] sold was too much for [PAWN_objective]. The warp has left its mark on [PAWN_possessive] psyche.

BackstoryDef.title: flect addict
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a hive city labourer who got hooked on flects, shards of warp-tainted glass that gave visions of other lives and otherworldly beings. The lure of staring into the flects and imbibing the sights they showed was too much for [PAWN_objective], who spent every coin [PAWN_pronoun] he could scrounge on more of them. The warp has left its mark on [PAWN_possessive] psyche.

BackstoryDef.title: Pirate chaplain
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was the on-board chaplain of a pirate voidship, preaching the holy word of the God-Emperor to [PAWN_possessive] crew and ensuring they kept on the spiritual straight and narrow even if they had long decided to commit to Lex-breaking. [PAWN_pronoun] took gleeful part in their raids and dedicated every smashed skull and charred corpse to His glory.

BackstoryDef.title: Lord General
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] attained the rank of Lord General in the Astra Militarum before being elevated to the head of a Rogue Trader house. [PAWN_possessive] life in command of the Emperor's armies was one of rugged plenty, but [PAWN_pronoun] saw [PAWN_possessive] share of combat and was used to commanding [PAWN_possessive] lessers even before taking the dynasty's reins.

BackstoryDef.title: Lord General
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] attained the rank of Lord General in the Astra Militarum and was instrumental in several great victories for the Imperium, with better-than-average personnel and materiel loss ratios. In recognition for [PAWN_possessive] valiant and faithful service, the High Lords of Terra awarded [PAWN_objective] a Warrant of Trade, ennobling [PAWN_objective] at the head of a Rogue Trader house.

BackstoryDef.title: planetary governor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent a while as governor of one of the Imperium's million worlds, which is usually a lifetime appointment, but the extenuating circumstances of dynastic succession pulled [PAWN_objective] offworld and into the dashing life of a voidfaring Rogue Trader. Though unused to hardship, [PAWN_pronoun] has great experience of running a complex administrative structure.

BackstoryDef.title: crime lord
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] clawed [PAWN_possessive] way to the top of a system-wide criminal cartel, and had a reputation for readiness to get [PAWN_possessive] hands dirty to get the job done and maintain [PAWN_possessive] position. Whether by hook or, more likely, by crook, [PAWN_pronoun] secured a Warrant of Trade and was able to take [PAWN_possessive] cartel into legitimacy with the approval of the High Lords of Terra themselves.

BackstoryDef.title: feudal noble
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a vassal noble on a feudal world with a largely medieval level of technology, expected to fulfill [PAWN_possessive] duty to [PAWN_possessive] liege lord and living off the labour of serfs and tenants. After performing an extraordinary service to the Imperium, [PAWN_pronoun] was raised to the position of Rogue Trader, but is still adapting to the wider galaxy.

BackstoryDef.title: noble
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a noble on an Imperial world, with unimaginable privilege compared to the people around [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_possessive] life was one of unceasing luxury, and being raised to the heights of a Rogue Trader dynasty has done nothing to dim [PAWN_possessive] expectations even on the rimworld.

BackstoryDef.title: chartist captain
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was the captain of a chartist vessel - a voidship that plied the interstellar tradelanes of the Imperium, lacking a navigator and relying on short jumps through the warp to make its slow way from system to system, laden down with cargo and passengers. [PAWN_pronoun] is well-used to commanding a voidship's crew and to a life spent in the void.

BackstoryDef.title: Navis Imperialis captain
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Before becoming a Rogue Trader, [PAWN_nameDef] was the captain of a Navis Imperialis cruiser, a city unto itself populated by tens of thousands of voidsmen and bristling with planet-ending firepower. [PAWN_pronoun] is well-used to command and to a life spent in the void, as well as the cut and thrust of void combat and the occasional boarding action.

BackstoryDef.title: Ministorum priest
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Before being ennobled as head of a Rogue Trader house, [PAWN_nameDef] was a priest of the Adeptus Ministorum, preaching the glory of the Emperor and the nobility of suffering in the name of Him on Terra. [PAWN_pronoun] has a strong command of rhetoric and thinks lay work is beneath [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: Arbites marshal
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a marshal of the Adeptus Arbites with responsibility for the Imperial Tithe collection of an entire subsector. [PAWN_pronoun] was feared by all levels of Imperial society even before elevation to the rank of Rogue Trader, and has extensive [PAWN_possessive] experience of cracking down on dissent and throwing [PAWN_possessive] bureaucratic weight around.
